DEFENDANTS ARE ORDERED TO REIMBURSE THE PLAINTIFF $250.00 AS THE REASONABLE COST INCURRED IN OBTAINING A DEFAULT IN THIS MATTER. DEFENDANTS TO FILE THEIR ANSWER FORTHWITH. MR.
